scope: Active Wave 1 provider confidence, checkpoint resumability, and Parquet Level 2 flush proof

activeProviderRows.name: Alpaca
notes: Closed by checked-in provider and stable execution seam tests.

activeProviderRows.name: Robinhood
notes: Only active provider row that remains runtime-bounded.
Confidence is polling-oriented and execution-adjacent, not websocket-validated.

activeProviderRows.name: Yahoo
notes: Not part of Meridian's live runtime-provider claim for Wave 1.

pilotReplaySampleSet.acceptanceCheck: Parser, canonical publisher, and JSONL sink output match the committed golden subset.

pilotReplaySampleSet.lane: repo-closed trade and quote parser coverage
pilotReplaySampleSet.acceptanceCheck: Trade and quote edge cases preserve symbol separation, timestamp handling, duplicate suppression, routing, and reconnect behavior.

pilotReplaySampleSet.sampleWindow: 2026-04-09 bounded runtime packet plus offline polling fixtures
pilotReplaySampleSet.acceptanceCheck: Offline polling, symbol search, historical bars, and execution seam tests pass; runtime evidence remains explicitly bounded.

pilotReplaySampleSet.sampleWindow: 2024-01-01 through 2024-01-02 daily fixtures and 2024-01-02 intraday session fixtures
pilotReplaySampleSet.acceptanceCheck: Daily, adjusted daily, and intraday aggregate fixtures deserialize into stable historical/fallback bars without implying live-provider readiness.
